blended.narrative: Hogadon is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 26".
